childhood.familyBackground: Billi was born into a Brazilian family with Italian heritage. His family had interests in healthcare and pharmaceuticals.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 빌리는 이탈리아 유산을 가진 브라질 가족에 태어났다.
childhood.education: University of São Paulo School of Medicine
childhood.earlyLife: Billi founded a pharmaceutical and healthcare company focusing on generic medicines and clinical research. He became a major Brazilian healthcare entrepreneur.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 빌리는 일반의약품 및 임상 연구에 초점을 맞춘 제약 및 의료 회사를 설립했다.

careerTimeline.event: Founded pharmaceutical company focused on generic medicines
careerTimeline.eventKo: 일반의약품에 초점을 맞춘 제약 회사 설립

careerTimeline.event: Expanded operations into clinical research and healthcare services
careerTimeline.eventKo: 임상 연구 및 의료 서비스로 운영 확장

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status through healthcare portfolio diversification
careerTimeline.eventKo: 의료 포트폴리오 다각화를 통해 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Generic drug market faced increased competition and price pressure
failures.descriptionKo: 일반의약품 시장이 증가된 경쟁과 가격 압력에 직면
failures.lesson: Pharmaceutical commoditization requires operational excellence and cost efficiency
failures.lessonKo: 제약 상품화는 운영 우수성과 비용 효율성이 필요하다

quotes.text: Generic medicines save lives by making healthcare affordable
quotes.textKo: 일반의약품은 의료를 저렴하게 함으로써 생명을 구한다

recommended.title: The Generic Drug Industry
recommended.author: Various
recommended.note: Shaped his understanding of competitive generic pharmaceutical markets
recommended.noteKo: 경쟁적 일반의약품 시장에 대한 이해를 형성함

personalTraits.knownFor: Brazilian pharmaceutical leadership; generic medicine expertise; healthcare entrepreneurship
personalTraits.knownForKo: 브라질 제약 리더십; 일반의약품 전문성; 의료 기업가정신
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports healthcare access and medical education in Brazil
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 브라질의 의료 접근성 및 의료 교육 지원
